about.headline: I build AI products end-to-end — from the model to the interface people actually use.
about.paragraph1: I started as a frontend engineer shipping React and React Native interfaces, focused on how software solves problems. I moved deeper into the systems behind the screen — and today I work as an AI Engineer building ontology products.
about.paragraph2: When I build, I carry a single idea across the whole stack: shaping the data and ontology, training and wiring up the models, and crafting a service that makes the intelligence feel effortless. I've shipped across fashion, e-commerce, education, AI, and physical security.
about.now: Building SAIP — a use-case-driven knowledge-graph builder.
about.focus: Knowledge graphs · Computer vision · AI products

buildLog.headline: How I work with AI agents.
buildLog.caption: Measured from git, session logs & the codebase — not product traffic · Co-Authored-By on every commit.

items.intent: Reason, context, natural fit — a feature ships only once I know why it's needed and how it blends into the service flow.
items.ease: Simplicity, usability — I take on the complexity so the user is left with the simplest path.
items.transparency: Transparency — I never build anything that happens without the customer knowing.

items.breadth: Breadth over depth — I trade deep specialization in any one area for range.
items.ai: All-in on AI — I deliberately don't sharpen my from-scratch, no-AI coding.
items.coverage: Critical-path testing — I don't chase 100% coverage of every line.

styleAR.name: StyleAR
styleAR.summary: An AR-powered virtual try-on solution that lets customers experience jewelry, fashion, and beauty products in real time.
styleAR.detail: Seamlessly integrated with e-commerce platforms like Cafe24, StyleAR offers fully customizable interfaces that align with each brand's identity. The solution drives customer engagement through QR code distribution across both online and offline channels. Supporting iOS, Android, and Windows across smartphones, kiosks, and smart mirrors, StyleAR transforms the shopping experience and significantly boosts customer satisfaction.

hyperChatbot.name: HyperChatbot
hyperChatbot.summary: A hybrid chatbot combining AI and rule-based approaches for contextually relevant conversations.
hyperChatbot.detail: Built as a web-based platform, HyperChatbot leverages natural language processing and knowledge graphs to deliver personalized consultations. By dynamically adapting response formats based on contextual rules, it creates engaging user experiences across diverse applications and use cases.

riss.name: Research Information Sharing Service (RISS)
riss.summary: A nationwide AI-powered platform providing public access to academic research papers.
riss.detail: RISS democratizes access to university research by centralizing scholarly materials through advanced AI technology. The platform fosters research collaboration and strengthens national competitiveness by making academic resources openly accessible to the public, supporting next-generation innovation and education.

smartCity.name: Smart City Total Management System
smartCity.summary: An AI-driven platform integrating video analysis for comprehensive urban disaster management.
smartCity.detail: This unified platform consolidates multiple information systems into an intelligent disaster safety framework. Using AI and real-time video stream analysis, it enables instant sharing of location data and CCTV footage during emergencies. The system optimizes response strategies and supports proactive disaster prevention through advanced big data analytics.

aiCamera.name: AI Camera
aiCamera.summary: An edge-based video processing solution enabling efficient multi-camera security management.
aiCamera.detail: Powered by distributed processing, this system analyzes video streams directly on edge devices, eliminating dependency on central servers. Each camera independently configures AI sensitivity, regions of interest, schedules, and models—reducing latency while enhancing security for small to medium-sized businesses.

vunexAI.name: VUNex AI
vunexAI.summary: An AI-powered video security solution designed specifically for small businesses to detect critical incidents and anomalies.
vunexAI.detail: Purpose-built for factories, retail stores, and offices, VUNex AI detects intrusions, falls, fires, and abnormal behaviors through intelligent video stream analysis. Unlike enterprise-focused solutions, it offers a cost-effective and scalable approach to enhancing workplace safety and protecting valuable assets.

vunexMLOps.name: VUNex MLOps
vunexMLOps.summary: A streamlined video data labeling solution designed for AI model training workflows.
vunexMLOps.detail: VUNex MLOps revolutionizes video annotation by eliminating the tedious frame-by-frame labeling process. For instance, a 10-second video at 30fps contains 300 frames—traditional tools require labeling each individually. VUNex MLOps enables single-pass labeling with automatic propagation across all frames, dramatically reducing annotation time while ensuring consistency and accuracy.

saip.name: SAIP
saip.summary: A web platform for building and using a Knowledge Graph end to end, guiding users from goal definition through pipelines, ontology modeling, and AI-powered analysis.
saip.detail: SAIP Builder turns source data into a queryable Knowledge Graph through a guided seven-step flow: define a Goal, design a visual Pipeline that pulls from databases, APIs, and files, explore the loaded Datasets, model an Ontology of Entity Types and Relations, build search Indexing, automate Workflows with human-in-the-loop approval, and finally ask questions in Chat or analyze with a governance Dashboard. The visual pipeline editor offers 21 transform node types for filtering, joining, validating, and parsing documents, while an embedded AI assistant (Agent Panel) in the Goal, Pipeline, Ontology, and Workflow editors drafts proposals from natural-language requests that users review and approve or reject before saving. The result is a visual, guided workbench that pairs ontology-backed search with natural-language querying, helping teams construct a Knowledge Graph step by step.
